title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ET Money - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ET Money - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
